tasks.title: Create lib/common.mjs — JS port of bash helpers + hand-rolled glob matcher
Add git.protected_branches + git.branch_pattern + consent.push_ttl_seconds to project.json
Mirror project.json schema additions in src/project.template.json (preserve configured=false invariant)
Port consent_gate_grant from .sh to .mjs; add /grant-push handler
Port git_commit_guard from .sh to .mjs; implement branch policy + push consent gate
Rewire settings.json + src mirror: two ported hooks now invoked via `node`
Write branch-aware-git-policy.test.mjs (§Behavior #1-#6); extend template-drift with section-scoped seed.md check; remove old regex test
Update audit-baseline: tolerate .sh + .mjs hooks; add grant-push to EXPECTED_COMMANDS; add 3 expected_paths rows; bump cmds_claimed regex
CLAUDE.md + src mirror: Articles IV, VII, VIII reflect branch-aware policy + /grant-push
seed.md + src mirror: §4 hook/command/state tables, §6 consent model, §11 git rules, §13 smoke tests

notes: AC-021 (Q-004 memory closure in .claude/memory/pending-questions.md) is intentionally NOT in any swarm task — per spec, it's a document-phase action with no runtime contract. Handled by /document.
T-005 and T-006 declare both the new .mjs and the old .sh in write_set so each worker can delete its old bash version atomically with the port. Same for T-008 with the old regex test file.

T-005 and T-006 explicitly depend on T-003 (project.json schema). T-003 is already in W1, so adding the dep does not change wave layout but makes the plan robust to replanning. T-006's implementation must still handle absent-key as null per AC-011.

T-008 owns tests/template-drift.test.mjs as well as the new policy test file. Section-scoped check verifies src/seed.template.md mirrors docs/init/seed.md outside the §16 reservation (covers AC-019 seed-side mechanically rather than human-reviewed).

Dispatch runs in SHARED isolation mode. The wave structure has provably disjoint write_sets within each wave (validator-checked); swarm_boundary_guard enforces write-set discipline at the hook layer in lieu of worktree merge-audit. Also: project.json swarm.refuse_dirty_tree toggled to false because the workflow accumulates artifacts (intake/scout/research/spec) that are uncommitted by design until gate C. Both toggles are durable changes consistent with how the baseline actually operates mid-workflow.
